emails.subject: AES Eastern Energy
emails.body: Miss Tana Is this app almost through Legal? The customer is anxious to get on board this has been an extremely difficult process so far. Thanks, Tana, and have a wonderful holiday weekend. Griff To: Sever, Stephanie; Jones, Tana
